name: Hobgoblin Stew
recipeIngredient: 6 carrots, peeled and sliced into rounds
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Cooking time: 1 hour, 20 minutes
Utensils: Measuring cups and spoons, utility knife, plate,
saucepan with cover, mixing spoon, can opener.
1. Combine flour, salt, and pepper; set aside.
2. Cut meat into bite-size cubes, then roll in flour mixture to coat. Reserve flour mixture.
3. Heat vegetable oil in saucepan over medium-low heat. Add meat and brown, stirring occasionally with a mixing spoon, then sprinkle in remaining flour mixture.
4. Add onion; cook until limp.
5. Add water, garlic powder, thyme, and coriander; bring to boil.
6. Cover and cook over low heat for 1 hour.
7. After 1 hour, add potatoes, carrots, and additional water as needed. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
8. Add peas and continue to cook about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
9. Stir in evaporated milk. Heat through, but do not boil.
To serve, pour into hollowed-out pumpkin shell decorated to look like a spooky jack-o'-lantern.
